painPoints: Overall digital health score is critically low at 32/100, indicating a broadly underperforming digital presence
Website performance score is only 42/100 on mobile and 53/100 on desktop, well below competitive thresholds
Mobile page speed is slow with a 4.8s Largest Contentful Paint, risking loss of nearly 40% of visitors before they see content
SEO health and visibility score is 28/100 with Tucker Albin not appearing in the top 50 organic results for any core commercial collection keywords
Placeholder content (lorem ipsum) is still visible on the /our-offices page, signaling an incomplete and unprofessional website
38% duplicate content detected across the site — far above the healthy threshold of under 10% — actively suppressing rankings
Multiple high-traffic pages including /commercial-debt-recovery (82%) and /ar-management (79%) have extremely high duplication rates
Missing meta descriptions on multiple key pages including /commercial-debt-recovery, /ar-management, /associations, /contact/, and /our-offices
Duplicate meta title on /ar-management page (copies the homepage title), confusing search engines about page relevance
Meta title on /associations page is too long at 78 characters, risking truncation in search results
Meta title on /contact/ page is too short at 38 characters, underutilizing ranking opportunity
H1 tag missing on /ar-management and /contact/ pages
Schema markup is not detected anywhere on the site, reducing eligibility for rich results and AI data extraction
Canonical tags are only partially implemented — missing on 4 pages — creating potential duplicate content ranking conflicts
7 broken links (404 errors) detected on the website, harming crawlability and user experience
12 images are missing alt text, hurting accessibility and image SEO signals
3 tap target elements are spaced too closely together on mobile, creating usability issues flagged by Google
AI visibility score is only 15/100 (22/100 in detailed audit), with Tucker Albin mentioned in only 2 of 12 AI queries across all platforms
Tucker Albin is completely absent from ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot responses across all 12 tested queries
Tucker Albin appears only as a secondary or low-ranked option on Claude and Gemini, never as a top recommendation
Competitors like The Kaplan Group (91.7% mention rate) and Altus Receivables dominate AI recommendations while Tucker Albin has only a 4.2% mention rate
Thin web presence, limited content authority, and weak structured data are causing AI platforms to exclude Tucker Albin from recommendations
Social media impact score is only 12/100 — the lowest score in the entire audit
Facebook page is dormant with infrequent posting and only 569 page likes
No Instagram profile exists, representing a missed brand presence opportunity
X (Twitter) profile exists but is inactive with minimal followers
No YouTube channel exists
No TikTok profile exists
Only 4 total posts across all platforms in the last 6 months, with 4 of 6 months having zero posts
Average posting frequency of only 0.7 posts per month versus a recommended 12–16 per month
Content types are text-only with no video content produced
No Google Ads conversion tag or active PPC campaigns detected, meaning Tucker Albin is invisible in paid search while competitors actively bid on target keywords
No remarketing or display advertising tags detected on the website
No Meta Pixel installed on the website, preventing Facebook/Instagram ad targeting and retargeting
No active ads found in the Meta Ad Library — zero paid social advertising presence
No Google Local Services Ads listing or Google Guaranteed badge detected
3 of the top 5 competitors are actively running paid ads while Tucker Albin has zero active paid advertising channels
Google Business Profile rating of 3.9 stars is below key competitors such as The Kaplan Group (4.9), Cedar Financial (4.5), and Prestige Services (4.3)
Facebook listing has an outdated address, creating NAP inconsistency that confuses search engines
Apple Maps listing is not claimed, leaving a gap in local directory presence
Bing Places listing is not claimed, missing a secondary search engine visibility opportunity
Yellow Pages listing contains outdated information, further undermining NAP consistency
Only 13 of 37 directory listings are accurate, with the rest needing corrections that are actively undermining local map pack rankings
No blog or content strategy exists on the website, eliminating a major source of organic traffic and AI training signal
No paid advertising infrastructure of any kind is in place — no conversion tracking, no pixels, no active campaigns — making it impossible to measure or scale digital marketing ROI
